languages.text: {n}Консоль, управляющая чудовищной установкой, словно растет из металлического пола. Матово-черные панели усеяны цепочками светящихся глифов и несколькими выступающими сферами.{/n}
{n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Консоль, управляющая чудовищной установкой, словно растет из металлического пола. Матово-черные панели усеяны цепочками светящихся глифов и несколькими выступающими сферами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}
{n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}

{n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. You can see no joins or welds on it — it is a matte black monolith, its flat top face dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding crystals.{/n}
{n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}
{n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巨大な装置を操作するコンソールは、金属製の床から生えているように見えます。継ぎ目や溶接痕は見当たりません。黒く光る文字列と突起した水晶が点在する、平らな表面を持つ黒曜石のような物体です。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. You can see no joins or welds on it — it is a matte black monolith, its flat top face dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding crystals.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巨大な装置を操作するコンソールは、金属製の床から生えているように見えます。継ぎ目や溶接痕は見当たりません。黒く光る文字列と突起した水晶が点在する、平らな表面を持つ黒曜石のような物体です。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La consola que controla este monstruoso dispositivo parece salir del suelo. Los paneles negro mate están cubierta de cadenas de glifos brillantes y algunos orbes que sobresalen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La consola que controla este monstruoso dispositivo parece salir del suelo. Los paneles negro mate están cubierta de cadenas de glifos brillantes y algunos orbes que sobresalen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}操控这台异形装置的控制台仿佛是从金属地板里长出来的。哑光的黑色方碑上点缀着连串的发光符文，与几枚凸起的球体。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}操控这台异形装置的控制台仿佛是从金属地板里长出来的。哑光的黑色方碑上点缀着连串的发光符文，与几枚凸起的球体。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Konsole, die das monströse Gerät steuert, scheint aus dem metallenen Boden zu wachsen. Die matt-schwarzen Armaturen sind mit leuchtenden Glyphen und einigen hervorstehenden Kugeln versehen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Konsole, die das monströse Gerät steuert, scheint aus dem metallenen Boden zu wachsen. Die matt-schwarzen Armaturen sind mit leuchtenden Glyphen und einigen hervorstehenden Kugeln versehen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Canavarca cihazı kontrol eden konsol, metal zeminden büyüyor gibi görünüyor. Mat siyah paneller, düz üst yüzeyi parlayan glif zincirleri ve birkaç çıkıntılı küreyle bezenmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Canavarca cihazı kontrol eden konsol, metal zeminden büyüyor gibi görünüyor. Mat siyah paneller, düz üst yüzeyi parlayan glif zincirleri ve birkaç çıkıntılı küreyle bezenmiş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La console qui contrôle cet appareil monstrueux semble avoir émergé du sol métallique. Les panneaux d'un noir mat sont parcourus de chaînes de glyphes lumineux et de quelques orbes saillants.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console that controls the monstrous device seems to grow out of the metal floor. The matte black panels are dotted with chains of glowing glyphs and a few protruding orbs.{/n}
